title: Define real Captain execution authority contract
goal: Design and implement the explicit contract for any future real Captain execution path, including evaluation-vs-execution authority naming, cryptographic evidence binding, dispatcher or webhook boundaries, and separate review gates.

acceptance.assertion: Evaluation authority and execution authority are separate terms, fields, and gates.
Any future execution path has explicit action-specific contracts and remains disabled unless all required authority evidence is present.
No merge, deploy, restart, fleet mutation or cleanup becomes default or implicitly enabled.

metadata.reason: PR #97 deliberately remains read-only and does not create a real execution authority path.
